content:
RORK вЂ” EXECUTE THE 15 REMAINING ITEMS ONE BY ONE

STOP ALL OTHER TASKS.

Do not return another summary.
Do not return another plan.
Do not ask which item to start.

Execute the items below in this exact order.

RULE

Complete one item fully, return proof, then continue immediately to the next item.

For every item return:

- exact root cause
- files changed
- line numbers
- code change
- test performed
- result
- commit SHA
- blocker, if any

Do not mark an item complete based only on code changes.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ITEM 1 вЂ” DIAGNOSTICS PANEL
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Move the diagnostics panel from the floating overlay into the protected Owner/Admin area.

Requirements:

- no floating diagnostics overlay on normal screens
- diagnostics route under Owner/Admin
- owner/admin role required
- show app version
- real Git SHA
- backend SHA
- APK build ID
- API health
- Supabase project reference
- auth state
- owner authorization state
- startup trace ID
- last sanitized runtime error

Verify the diagnostics panel is not visible to normal users.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ITEM 2 вЂ” PROJECTS PROGRESSIVE LOADING
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Implement:

- cursor pagination
- initial page size 10
- cached first page
- skeleton placeholders
- onEndReached next-page loading
- stable project IDs
- deduplication
- pull-to-refresh
- per-module error state
- offline state
- retry

Do not load all projects at once.

Verify first 10 projects render before later pages.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ITEM 3 вЂ” DEALS PROGRESSIVE LOADING
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Implement:

- cursor pagination
- initial page size 10
- cached first page
- skeleton placeholders
- next-page prefetch
- deduplication
- stable IDs
- pull-to-refresh
- retry
- empty state
- offline state

Verify live, draft and archived deals are separated correctly.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ITEM 4 вЂ” PROJECTS/DEALS DATA FETCHING
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Create or repair the data-fetching layer.

Requirements:

- one canonical query per module
- request cancellation
- retry only retryable errors
- no retry on 400/401/403
- exponential backoff
- stale-while-revalidate
- background refresh
- request deduplication
- no duplicate provider fetches
- no copying every response into global context

Return all duplicate requests removed.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ITEM 5 вЂ” PROJECTS/DEALS REALTIME
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Implement realtime delta updates for:

- INSERT
- UPDATE
- DELETE

Requirements:

- apply changes by stable record ID
- do not refetch full collection after every event
- prevent duplicate subscriptions
- unsubscribe on unmount
- unsubscribe on account change
- preserve pagination state
- avoid duplicate records

Verify one project and one deal update live without full refresh.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ITEM 6 вЂ” IMAGE AND MEDIA OPTIMIZATION
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Apply to:

- projects
- deals
- reels
- members
- properties
- portfolio

Requirements:

- thumbnail first
- lazy-load full media
- fixed dimensions to prevent layout shift
- image cache
- upload compression
- resized variants
- CDN delivery
- retry failed media
- placeholder image
- no full-resolution image in list views

Verify scrolling does not repeatedly download the same files.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ITEM 7 вЂ” NAVIGATION OPTIMIZATION
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Audit and fix:

- duplicate routes
- duplicate screen instances
- repeated mounts
- router loops
- redirects during render
- unstable route names
- nested navigation conflicts
- back navigation after logout
- owner-route bypasses
- screen focus refetch loops

Return every route removed, renamed or corrected.

Verify Android Back cannot reopen protected Owner/Admin screens after logout.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ITEM 8 вЂ” FULL ADMIN CRUD
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Complete Admin CRUD for:

- projects
- deals
- members
- investors
- properties
- reels
- announcements
- landing content

Required actions:

- create
- read
- edit
- archive
- restore
- delete
- publish
- unpublish
- reorder where applicable

Requirements:

- owner/admin role required
- confirmation for destructive actions
- audit log
- exact API/database error
- optimistic update with rollback where safe

Verify each CRUD action with real production data or a clearly labeled test record removed afterward.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ITEM 9 вЂ” OWNER SIGN-IN FINAL FIX
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Fix the current false denial:

вЂњThis account is not the IVX owner.вЂќ

Audit:

- active AuthProvider
- Supabase project
- authenticated user ID
- canonical owner profile
- role table
- active status
- duplicate owner checks
- duplicate auth listeners
- cached non-owner session
- role query timing
- route guard timing

Required owner rule:

authenticated user ID matches canonical owner record
AND role = owner
AND active = true

Do not authorize only by email.

Verify:

- correct owner account accepted
- non-owner rejected
- inactive owner rejected
- logout works
- reopen behavior correct
- no false denial
- no automatic wrong-account login

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ITEM 10 вЂ” AUTOMATED TESTS
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Write and run automated tests for:

- auth state transitions
- owner authorization
- duplicate listeners
- project pagination
- deal pagination
- realtime deduplication
- admin route protection
- logout/back protection
- module error boundaries
- retry behavior

Return:

- test files
- test count
- pass/fail count
- exact failures
- coverage where available

Do not claim test completion if tests were not executed.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ITEM 11 вЂ” 50-TEST QA MATRIX
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Run the full QA matrix.

At minimum include:

- startup
- owner login
- wrong password
- non-owner denial
- logout
- back protection
- projects
- deals
- reels
- members
- admin CRUD
- uploads
- offline mode
- retry recovery
- no black screen
- no Maximum Update Depth
- no duplicate records
- no infinite loader

Return one table with:

- test number
- test
- device/environment
- result
- evidence
- trace ID

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ITEM 12 вЂ” GITHUB ACCESS AND PUSH
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Credentials are already stored.

Verify:

- token variable exists
- variable binding works
- GitHub API authentication
- repository permission
- branch permission

Return only:

- variable name
- PRESENT or MISSING
- HTTP status
- sanitized error

Only ask for intervention if verified:

- 401
- 403
- expired
- revoked
- deleted
- missing

If access works:

- push all changes
- verify remote HEAD
- return full 40-character SHA
- return commit URL

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ITEM 13 вЂ” SHA ALIGNMENT
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Make these identical:

- GitHub HEAD SHA
- Android APK embedded SHA
- backend deployed SHA
- /health SHA
- diagnostics SHA

Do not use a text label as the APK SHA.

Embed the real 40-character Git SHA into the app and backend.

Fail the item if any SHA differs.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ITEM 14 вЂ” VERCEL BACKEND REFERENCE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

Audit:

ai-gateway.vercel.sh

Determine whether it is:

- active AI provider dependency
- active hosting dependency
- obsolete code
- fallback
- dead configuration

If obsolete:

- remove it
- replace with approved IVX AI/backend route
- remove environment variable
- redeploy
- verify zero runtime requests

If intentionally retained:

- document the exact service purpose
- confirm it is not hosting the IVX app
- show all callers
- show data sent
- show fallback behavior
- show security controls

Do not rename the string and call it removed.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
ITEM 15 вЂ” FINAL BUILD, DEPLOY AND DEVICE VERIFICATION
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

After Items 1вЂ“14 are complete:

1. Clean install dependencies.
2. Run TypeScript.
3. Run lint.
4. Run Expo Doctor.
5. Build signed Android release APK.
6. Deploy matching backend SHA.
7. Verify /health.
8. Install APK on a clean Android device.
9. Run full QA.
10. Record the complete flow.

Required real-device flow:

- clean install
- cold launch
- Owner Login
- correct owner sign-in
- Owner AI enabled
- Admin opens
- Projects pagination
- Deals pagination
- Reels playback
- Video upload
- Members pagination
- Admin CRUD
- logout
- Android Back protection
- offline launch
- online recovery
- 10 repeated cold launches

Required final evidence:

- repository
- branch
- final GitHub SHA
- commit URL
- backend deployment ID
- backend SHA
- /health response
- APK filename
- APK link
- APK SHA-256
- APK embedded Git SHA
- TypeScript result
- lint result
- Expo Doctor result
- automated-test result
- 50-test QA matrix
- Android logcat
- real-device recording

FINAL ACCEPTANCE

Do not say complete until:

- all 15 items pass
- GitHub SHA = APK SHA = backend SHA
- owner sign-in works
- projects and deals load progressively
- realtime works
- Admin CRUD works
- no obsolete Vercel runtime dependency remains
- no Maximum Update Depth error
- no black screen
- no infinite loading
- real-device QA is attached

Start Item 1 now and continue automatically through Item 15.
